summary: Frontend-only verification of the two fixes: (1) JSON export blob download under the PWA service-worker scope, and (2) Fase 1 case-length unit selector (in <-> mm) with conversion + persistence. All 4 review scenarios pass end-to-end against the live preview URL.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: x-source instrumentation injects a <span> inside <option>. Cosmetic, not introduced by this iteration; does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx exportProjects: anchor click on blob URL + delayed URL.revokeObjectURL(1500ms) is correct. Download triggers cleanly in a normal tab; service-worker.js v2 now early-returns on non-http(s) and cross-origin fetches, so blob: URLs are no longer intercepted (PWA-installed scenario fix). The normal tab path was verified (download captured, valid JSON, success toast).

Phase1.jsx changeLenUnit: factor = 25.4 for in->mm, 1/25.4 for mm->in; rounded to 2 decimals for mm, 3 decimals for inches. Confirmed 2.005" -> 50.93 mm (matches 50.927 rounded to 2 dp). Persisted to localStorage via saveData({case_length:{lengths, unit}}).
Phase1.jsx fmtLen renders '50.93 mm' / '2.005"' as expected. Field label switches to 'Medida de vaina (mm)' / 'Medida de vaina (")' based on lenUnit.
importProjects in Home.jsx successfully re-imports the exported file: toast read 'Importado: 0 nuevo(s), 1 actualizado(s)' for the same project id (correct idempotent update path).
Suggestion (non-blocking): the global 'input' capture-phase listener in Home.jsx remains; harmless because text fields containing letters do not match the digit-only regex. No new issues introduced.
test_credentials: n/a - offline localStorage app, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Created project '.308 Winchester / Lapua / EXP1' in the test browser's localStorage. No shared backend state affected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App URL=REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. For the new-project flow, note that 'new-caliber' (data-testid) is a <select> element, so use select_option (by label or value), not fill. 'new-brand' and 'new-lot' are inputs. project-select also is <select>; due to x-source instrumentation each <option> contains a child <span> which causes Playwright to think the option element isn't strictly 'visible' on first try - resolved by reading select.options directly via page.evaluate and then select_option(value=...). Case-length section stores its unit under project.data.case_length.unit in localStorage; default is 'in'.

test_run_evidence.project_creation: .308 Winchester / Lapua / EXP1 created and selectable.
test_run_evidence.export_download: Playwright captured download (filename: f-class-proyectos-2026-06-29.json). JSON parsed; entries=1, caliber='.308 Winchester', case_brand='Lapua', case_lot='EXP1'.
test_run_evidence.export_toast: '1 proyecto(s) exportado(s)' visible in DOM. No PAGE_ERR. No console errors related to blob/service-worker.
test_run_evidence.import_toast: 'Importado: 0 nuevo(s), 1 actualizado(s)' visible after set_input_files on import-file-input.
test_run_evidence.case_length_default_unit: len-unit value='in'; input label='MEDIDA DE VAINA (")'; entered 2.005 -> chip and 'Recortar todas a (más corta)' both show '2.005"'.
test_run_evidence.case_length_switch_to_mm: Selecting Milímetros switches input label to 'MEDIDA DE VAINA (MM)'; previously stored 2.005" auto-converts to '50.93 mm' chip; adding 50.50 in mm produces chips ['50.93 mm','50.50 mm']; shortest displayed as '50.50 mm'.
test_run_evidence.persistence_reload: After full page reload + reselect, lenUnit='mm', chips ['50.93 mm','50.50 mm'] and 'Recortar todas a (más corta)'='50.50 mm' restored from localStorage.

rca of the issue: Not applicable - both fixes verified working as intended on the live preview. The export download triggers correctly with the blob URL pattern and the success toast appears; the unit selector converts and persists values as specified (25.4 factor).
